rulings.Case Title: ANNETTE HOBRUCKER VS. KRISTEN MICHAEL HANSEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE HOBRUCKER's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement DENIED without prejudice. No competent evidence of failure to vacate under the terms of agreement provided. Thorndal Declaration Paragraph 4 and Hobrucker Declaration Paragraph 7. Additionally no Proof of Service of the Motion by actual server, i.e. Western Messenger. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN M ROBERTSON VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. and JOSEPH TORRANO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to September 25, 2013. Moving party is again ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C (See April 9, 2013 minute order) and provide courtesy copy of operative complaint to Department 501 no later than September 9, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposition and reply are due in accordance with the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN M ROBERTSON VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. and JOSEPH TORRANO's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to September 25, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of operative complaint to Department 501 no later than September 9, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposition and reply are due in accordance with the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HWA 555 OWNERS LLC, A DELAWRE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. THE ALIOTO LAW FIRM, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Assignment Order And For Order Restraining Judgment Debtors
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF HWA 555 OWNERS LLC's Motion For Assignment Order And For Order Restraining Judgment Debtors OFF CALENDAR, moot. Stipulation and Order Re: Assignment of Fees filed on August 21, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PERSONALITY HOTELS, LLC VS. YUNG TRAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT YUNG TRAN's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED, 5 days to respond. Motion is untimely per CCP 1167.4, it was filed on June 27, 2013 and set for hearing on July 30, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARCHSTONE SOUTH MARKET, LLC VS. KING LEI AND ALLAN CHU INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT ALLAN CHU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to September 18, 2013 to be heard with other pending demurrer. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition to department 501 no later than September 9, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than September 9, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARCHSTONE SOUTH MARKET, LLC VS. KING LEI AND ALLAN CHU INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS LOUIE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to September 18, 2013 to be heard with other pending demurrer. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition to department 501 no later than September 9, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than September 9, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. TRINA RIGBY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT TRINA RIGBY's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EMERALD FUND, INC. VS. TAIBEN BROWN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT TAIBEN BROWN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges landlord-tenant relationship and facts giving rise to unlawful detainer, i.e. illegal activity and breach of lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK Y. WOO VS. RICARDO ALVAREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT RICARDO ALVAREZ's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Defendant concedes that Plaintiff has standing. (Reply 1:23). Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK Y. WOO VS. RICARDO ALVAREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT RICARDO ALVAREZ and NORELLY ALVAREZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant concedes that Plaintiff has standing (Reply 1:23) and complaint/notice is not unintelligible to a person "of common understanding" and clearly demands possession. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. MARIO DIAZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, August 30, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT ANTHONY DIAZ's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. Pre-judgment claimant is not a named defendant and acknowledges actual receipt of summons and complaint along with a blank form for pre-judgment claim, which he filed with the Court. Anthony Diaz shall have 5 days to file response. = (501/REQ)
